sources.title: QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard

content:
Based on the provided release notes and the strict exclusion rules:

*   The Hugging Face release for "QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard" is excluded as it falls under "model benchmark comparisons."
*   The Codex CLI alpha releases (rust-v0.123.0-alpha.6, 0.123.0-alpha.5, 0.123.0-alpha.4, 0.123.0-alpha.3) are excluded because they are "alpha/nightly/dev releases" and do not explicitly mention a "major feature" in their titles.

Therefore, no relevant changes are extracted under the given criteria.
